ab: ’Ase, maymoo kake wamece na sasolasolate, doo myaso pasodame nakoa?
ch: W:’Ase，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: kacaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: kadrowa koa, kikay ka yaini ki Momoni.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Momoni’s.

ab: doo myaso pasodame koa padodaw’o, dodaw’o mekake swavivi mosoa.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.
Sure, take it.
Thank you and thank Panay for me.
May I help you?

ab: no savivi mekake nakay drodrosa na solate.
en: I want to return these two books.
No problem and what else do you need?
I would like to borrow these three books.

ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.
You haven’t returned me the eraser.
I returned it yesterday.

ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?
Did you lend it to kacaw?

ab: iigo’o kake, ko wa kiboboo nyane.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.
I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Momoni, kikay ebele ka pasodamini nyani mosoa ki ’Ase?
en: panay, did kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: ’aini, kikay ka langaini koa ki titina.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.
kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.
panay, did you borrow money from kacaw?

ab: e’e, ko savivi mekake sesane, la kaymoo ka wamece na payso.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.
Then, when will you return the money?
I will return to him tomorrow.
Okay, I will tell kacaw for you.
